final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the state machine will remain in the CONNECTED state indefinitely once connected, which is contrary to the actual behavior of resetting to IDLE upon a successful connection.
module bluetooth_fsm (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input start_connect,
    input connection_success,
    output reg [1:0] state
);
    // State encoding
    localparam IDLE = 2'b00;
    localparam CONNECTING = 2'b01;
    localparam CONNECTED = 2'b10;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            state <= IDLE; // Reset to IDLE
        end else begin
            case (state)
                IDLE: begin
                    if (start_connect) begin
                        state <= CONNECTING;
                    end
                end
                CONNECTING: begin
                    if (connection_success) begin
                        state <= CONNECTED;
                    end else begin
                        state <= IDLE; // Connection failed
                    end
                end
                CONNECTED: begin
                    state <= IDLE; // Reset on successful connection
                end
                default: state <= IDLE; // Default case
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the state machine will remain in the CONNECTED state indefinitely once connected, which is contrary to the actual behavior of resetting to IDLE upon a successful connection.
